message:
fix: replace panicking expect/unwrap with proper error handling

- hooks.rs: Replace .expect() with .ok_or_else() on JSON array access
  to return errors instead of panicking on unexpected JSON structure
- benchmark_scheduler.rs: Replace .unwrap() on stdout/stderr pipe
  capture with .ok_or_else() for graceful error propagation; use
  let-else pattern instead of is_none() + unwrap() for speedscore
- pipeline.rs: Fix integer overflow in Duration calculations by using
  try_into() instead of unchecked `as u32` casts, and saturating_mul
  instead of unchecked multiplication
- transfer.rs: Fix unreliable rsync file count fallback that would
  miscount progress/stats/error lines as transferred files; add
  partial transfer detection warnings and artifact retrieval validation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
